brand_profiles.name: Demo Studio
brand_profiles.audience: Founders, operators, sales teams, and stakeholders

style_systems.name: Clean Growth System
visual_rules: Use one clear headline and one visual proof point per slide.
Prefer product screenshots, clean charts, and inspectable diagrams over decoration.
Blue is the stable navigation color; teal and amber are used for emphasis.
layout_rules: Use recurring slide families so a 30-deck batch still feels like one system.
Split dense content into multiple slides instead of shrinking text.
